mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_ROUTE.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO ROUTE ( ROUTE_NO, START_NAME, START_LAT, START_LNG, END_NAME, END_LAT, END_LNG, MEMBER_NO, START_STATION, END_STATION ) VALUES ( #{routeNo}, #{startName}, #{startLat}, #{startLng}, #{endName}, #{endLat}, #{endLng}, #{memberNo}, #{startStation}, #{endStation} )

INSERT INTO PUSH ( PUSH_NO, PUSH_NAME, TRANSPORT_TYPE, ARRIVE_TIME, PREPARE_TIME, SPARE_TIME, PUSH_TIME, DAY_OF_WEEK, MEMBER_NO, ROUTE_NO ) VALUES ( SEQ_PUSH.NEXTVAL, #{pushName}, #{transportType}, #{arriveTime}, #{prepareTime}, #{spareTime}, #{pushTime}, #{dayOfWeek}, #{memberNo}, #{routeNo} )
